stem: A total of 3 regular pentagons each have side length a. A total of 5 regular hexagons each have side length b. None of these pentagons and hexagons shares a side. The sum of the perimeters of all these pentagons and hexagons is 240. Which equation represents this situation?
rationale: Each pentagon has perimeter 5a, so three pentagons contribute 3 × 5a = 15a. Each hexagon has perimeter 6b, so five contribute 5 × 6b = 30b. Total: 15a + 30b = 240. Choice B is correct.
